graphite.$description: Graphite — Primary action fill, body text, dark workshop background — dense near-black with 18.3:1 contrast on white gives the wordmark and CTAs architectural weight

pure-white.$description: Pure White — Page canvas, card surfaces, button text on graphite, reverse section background — the paper on which everything sits

ink-black.$description: Ink Black — Icon strokes, hairlines, and SVG illustration outlines — 21:1 contrast on white guarantees icon legibility at any size

fog-border.$description: Fog Border — Hairline dividers, card borders, table separators — the quiet grid line that organizes without asserting itself

steel.$description: Steel — Secondary text, muted nav borders, icon detail — 40-50% darker than fog for progressive disclosure

silver-mist.$description: Silver Mist — Tertiary text, placeholder, decorative strokes — the lightest voice in the type hierarchy

charcoal.$description: Charcoal — Dark workshop card surfaces and elevated dark-mode containers — one step lighter than graphite to read as a separate surface layer

plaster.$description: Plaster — Subtle surface for inset cards and section backgrounds when white needs to recede

prismic-violet.$description: Prismic Violet — Violet accent for outlined action borders, linked labels, and lightweight interactive emphasis. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

prismic-blue.$description: Prismic Blue — Secondary outlined actions, marketer-side accent headings, icon strokes — the cool counterweight to violet, always paired with dark text

prismic-green.$description: Prismic Green — Green decorative accent for icons, marks, and small graphic details

lavender-wash.$description: Lavender Wash — Testimonial card border, list highlight background — a pastel mood-board tint for social proof blocks

lavender-cream.$description: Lavender Cream — Lavender-tinted card surface, soft highlight wash — pairs with Lavender Wash border for layered mood-board cards

sky-wash.$description: Sky Wash — Testimonial card border, cool pastel accent — pairs with Prismic Blue for the marketer-side narrative

peach-wash.$description: Peach Wash — Warm testimonial card border — the third mood-board tint for testimonial rotation

peach-cream.$description: Peach Cream — Peach-tinted card surface — the warm counterpart to Lavender Cream

mint-wash.$description: Mint Wash — Testimonial card border — the fourth mood-board tint closing the pastel set

mint-cream.$description: Mint Cream — Mint-tinted card surface — pairs with Mint Wash border for cool-warm pastel balance

copyfont.$description: copyFont — detected in extracted data but not described by AI

prismic-headings-custom.$description: All headings from subhead (16-22px) through display (56px); weight 500 for sub-section headers, weight 700 for hero/display; -0.025em tracking at every size creates the tight editorial cadence that distinguishes Prismic from generic SaaS headlines

prismic-copy-custom.$description: Body text, nav items, button labels, link text, card copy; 16px @ 500/600 is the dominant voice at 1.5 line-height; 18px at 1.56 for paragraph reading comfort; 14px at 1.43 for dense list and footer contexts; weight 700 reserved for button labels and emphasized inline text

headingsfont.$description: headingsFont — detected in extracted data but not described by AI

canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Default page background across hero, features, and footer

inset-surface.$description: Surface level 1: Subtle elevation when white needs to recede behind grouped content

pastel-card.$description: Surface level 2: Mood-board testimonial cards with chromatic border treatment

pastel-card-cool.$description: Surface level 2: Cool-tinted mood-board variant for the marketer narrative

dark-workshop.$description: Surface level 3: Charcoal band for developer/marketer split section, inverse cards float on top

dark-card.$description: Surface level 4: Elevated dark surface for cards inside the workshop band
